title: Dev Log Launch
content: Welcome to my new dev log! This is the first entry where I'll be sharing updates about my projects, experiments, and learnings. Stay tuned for more!

title: Setting Up GitHub Pages
content: I've been working on setting up this GitHub Pages site. Using Vite + Vue + Vuetify has made the development process smooth and efficient. The base configuration was straightforward.

title: Vue 3 Composition API
content: Been diving deep into the Composition API lately. The flexibility it provides for code organization is amazing. Here is a simple example of reactive state management.

title: 3D Printed Robot Arm
content: Just finished printing a new robot arm design. Used PLA+ material and designed it in Fusion 360. It has 4 degrees of freedom!

title: New Portfolio Design
content: Redesigned my portfolio with a fresh new look. Focused on minimalism and better mobile experience.

title: API Gateway Project
content: Released a new API gateway project with rate limiting and caching. Built with Node.js and Redis.
